sections.intro:
TheMist Eatersare one of theSquadsfromInto The Breachadded in the Advanced Edition. They consist of theThruster Mech,Smog MechandControl Mechand are unlockable for 4 coins.
Much like theRusting Hulks, the Mist Eaters have a large number of smoke-dispensing tools that work to their advantage. Rather than making the smoke a Vek hazard it is instead used as a healing source with the passiveNanofilter Mendingweapon, consuming the smoke tile in the process so that the mechs can still attack.
sections.Strategies:
- The Thruster and Smog Mechs can easily nullify enemy attacks, especially if the Smog Mech's Smoldering Shells has more smoke.
  - The Thruster Mech is the most important damage source for the Mist Eaters but is very weak against groups or in enclosed spaces. Make sure it has lots of row and column space so the Reverse Thrusters can inflict the most damage.
  - Nanofilter Mending is capable of reviving disabled mechs, giving the squad very high survivability. Using mechs to block attacks from damaging the grid of objectives often and rely on heals to keep your pilots alive.
  - The Control Mech is one of the best science mechs as its Vek movement lets them tear each other apart, reliably neutralising two threats with one action. Getting the first movement upgrade on the Control Shot is vital and make sure that the second island hasLeapersso that they instantly kill any normal Vek.Control Shot can also move other allied units that can move regularly, including mechs, robots and tanks. This can be situationally helpful in moving webbed allies to safety.Control Shot cannot move enemies or allies without movement; this includes theEarth Mover,Blobs,Spiderling EggsandBoulders.
  - Smoke is extremely well-suited for missions that involve avoiding kills, but the squad's overall damage output can be a little low due to a lack of AoE damage and pushes. Missions that involve killing a lot of enemies can be challenging.
  - While the large amount of smoke generation suggests thatCamila Verais the best pilot for this squad, all mechs will remove smoke and only lets her provide web immunity. The Mist Eaters work well with other pilots:Chen RongandArchimedes: Lets the Control Mech maneuver out of danger after moving.Mafan: Grants the Control Mech +1 Movement on its Control Shot instantly.KazaaakplethandHarold Schmidt: Grants some form of push to the squad.Henry KwanandProspero: For more versatile positioning of the Smog Mech.
sections.Trivia: - The Mist Eaters are the only squad in the game that have two flying mechs.

Mist Eaters
“
Airborne particles provide the material necessary for nano-bots to repair these Mechs.
„
The
Mist Eaters
are one of the
Squads
from
Into The Breach
added in the Advanced Edition. They consist of the
Thruster Mech
,
Smog Mech
and
Control Mech
and are unlockable for 4 coins.
Much like the
Rusting Hulks
, the Mist Eaters have a large number of smoke-dispensing tools that work to their advantage. Rather than making the smoke a Vek hazard it is instead used as a healing source with the passive
Nanofilter Mending
weapon, consuming the smoke tile in the process so that the mechs can still attack.

Squad Achievements
[
]
Stay With Me!
Heal 12 damage over the course of a single Island.
Let's Walk
Move Enemies with Control Shot 120 spaces in one game.
On the Backburner
Do 4 damage with the Reverse Thrusters.
Strategies
[
]
The Thruster and Smog Mechs can easily nullify enemy attacks, especially if the Smog Mech's Smoldering Shells has more smoke.
The Thruster Mech is the most important damage source for the Mist Eaters but is very weak against groups or in enclosed spaces. Make sure it has lots of row and column space so the Reverse Thrusters can inflict the most damage.
Nanofilter Mending is capable of reviving disabled mechs, giving the squad very high survivability. Using mechs to block attacks from damaging the grid of objectives often and rely on heals to keep your pilots alive.
The Control Mech is one of the best science mechs as its Vek movement lets them tear each other apart, reliably neutralising two threats with one action. Getting the first movement upgrade on the Control Shot is vital and make sure that the second island has
Leapers
so that they instantly kill any normal Vek.
Control Shot can also move other allied units that can move regularly, including mechs, robots and tanks. This can be situationally helpful in moving webbed allies to safety.
Control Shot cannot move enemies or allies without movement; this includes the
Earth Mover
,
Blobs
,
Spiderling Eggs
and
Boulders
.
Smoke is extremely well-suited for missions that involve avoiding kills, but the squad's overall damage output can be a little low due to a lack of AoE damage and pushes. Missions that involve killing a lot of enemies can be challenging.
While the large amount of smoke generation suggests that
Camila Vera
is the best pilot for this squad, all mechs will remove smoke and only lets her provide web immunity. The Mist Eaters work well with other pilots:
Chen Rong
and
Archimedes
: Lets the Control Mech maneuver out of danger after moving.
Mafan
: Grants the Control Mech +1 Movement on its Control Shot instantly.
Kazaaakpleth
and
Harold Schmidt
: Grants some form of push to the squad.
Henry Kwan
and
Prospero
: For more versatile positioning of the Smog Mech.
Trivia
[
]
The Mist Eaters are the only squad in the game that have two flying mechs.
